nodes.label: Intake Demo Requests
nodes.description: Fetches inbound demo requests and enforces the circuit breaker limit.

nodes.label: Enrich Lead Data
nodes.description: Uses Apollo.io (mocked) to add firmographic data to the lead.

nodes.label: Score Leads
nodes.description: Scores enriched leads against the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP).

nodes.label: Route Leads to Salesforce
nodes.description: Creates Salesforce opportunities for leads exceeding the ICP threshold.
